abstract.text: Detailed changelog from v5.0.0 release.

inlineContent.text: Improved plan initialization: plan readiness is now detected through a script injected before start. This allows for automatic plan reboot detection and more accurate determination of readiness for interaction;
Increased SDK minimum version to iOS16;
to build a route restricted to accessible segments only;
to display a plan or specific location within its boundaries;
to zoom to a specific location on a plan;
to request coordinates about specific booths and exhibitors;
to highlight Booths and Exhibitors together;
to reset the plan to its original state;
for specific callbacks on a plan;
default value removed, now requires explicit array;
Fix: booth selection reset when calling
Fix: expo throws timeout error if expokey starts from digit;
Fix: white screen when opening a downloaded plan in multiple apps simultaneously;
Fix: a plan with the new engine was reloaded with an error when opened from an archive;
is now sync and not throwing errors. All provider errors will be redirected to
Added default values for selection methods, now with default values they act as deselection methods;
for prebuilding the route with one waypoint;
with empty array will reset the route;
to better initialization and plan management.
from global state to a plan initialization for better controllability.
to receive an array of available
SDK architecture has been completely redesigned, now a
is responsible for managing a plan
UI layer is passive, reusable and lightweight
You can download an unlimited number of plans for offline use
You can preload downloaded plans and plans from the internet for later use, no limits
Location provider wrappers are now open source
